mapper.insert: insert into student(name, age, gender, className, grade) values(#{name}, #{age}, #{gender}, #{className}, #{grade})
mapper.update: update student set name = #{name}, age = #{age}, gender = #{gender}, className = #{className}, grade = #{grade} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select id, name, age, gender, className, grade from student where id = #{id}
select id, name, age, gender, className, grade from student

select id, name, age, gender, className, grade from student
and name like concat('%', #{name}, '%')
and gender = #{gender}
and className like concat('%', #{className}, '%')
and grade like concat('%', #{grade}, '%')
